\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.58\postprocessfigurewidth,
    title={Users below threshold},
    xlabel={Time [s]},
    ylabel={Users below 0 dB},
    grid=major,
    legend pos=south east,
    ymin=-0.54000000,
    ymax=9.54000000,
  ]
    \addplot[gray, densely dotted, no markers] coordinates {(60.00000000,-0.54000000) (60.00000000,9.54000000)};
    \addplot[gray, densely dotted, no markers] coordinates {(120.00000000,-0.54000000) (120.00000000,9.54000000)};
    \addplot[gray, densely dotted, no markers] coordinates {(180.00000000,-0.54000000) (180.00000000,9.54000000)};
    \addplot[gray, densely dotted, no markers] coordinates {(240.00000000,-0.54000000) (240.00000000,9.54000000)};

    \addplot[gray, densely dotted, no markers] coordinates {(480.00000000,-0.54000000) (480.00000000,9.54000000)};
    \addplot[gray, densely dotted, no markers] coordinates {(540.00000000,-0.54000000) (540.00000000,9.54000000)};
    \addplot[gray, densely dotted, no markers] coordinates {(600.00000000,-0.54000000) (600.00000000,9.54000000)};

    \addlegendentry{Central massive MIMO}
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedFixedColor] table[x=time_s,y=users_below_threshold,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/users_below_threshold_distributed_fixed.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed fixed}
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor] table[x=time_s,y=users_below_threshold,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/users_below_threshold_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed movable}
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
